backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining Show and DJ types with full CRUD operations, including creating/retrieving DJs and shows, assigning DJs to shows, and fetching the current show.
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report with no recorded features.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document summarizing each frontend source file's purpose, covering components, pages, hooks, and config files for the Country Channel app.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS entry file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes including colors, sidebar, and chart tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React app titled 'The Country Channel', mounting the app at the #root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Sets up TanStack Router with public routes (Home, Shows, DJs) under a Layout and admin routes (Dashboard, ManageShows, ManageDJs) under AdminLayout.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminLayou: Provides the admin panel shell with a responsive sidebar navigation (desktop and mobile overlay), a top header bar with breadcrumb and back-to-site link, and an Outlet for nested admin routes.
frontend/src/components/admin/DJFormModa: Modal dialog for adding a new DJ or viewing an existing DJ's details; supports create via useCreateDJ mutation but does not support editing due to backend limitations.
frontend/src/components/admin/ShowFormMo: Modal dialog for creating a new show or editing an existing show's DJ assignment; uses useCreateShow and useAssignDjToShow mutations with form validation and day/DJ selectors.
frontend/src/components/DJCard.tsx: Card component displaying a DJ's avatar, name, bio, and associated shows with country-themed styling using Tailwind and Lucide icons.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer with brand info, quick navigation links, live status indicator, copyright, and a caffeine.ai attribution link with UTM tracking.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Public layout wrapper composing Navigation, a page Outlet, and Footer for all public-facing pages.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Sticky top navigation bar with branding, nav links, an admin link, and a pulsing 'On Air' indicator (with show title) that appears on both desktop and mobile when a show is live.
frontend/src/components/OnAirNow.tsx: Displays the currently on-air radio show with DJ info, schedule, and an animated 'On Air' badge, or a placeholder message when nothing is airing. Uses skeleton loading state and fetches data via useCurrentShow and useGetAllDJs hooks.
frontend/src/components/ShowCard.tsx: Renders a card UI for a single radio show, displaying its title, description, schedule day/time, and associated DJ name using icons from lucide-react.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using the current Internet Identity, returning an anonymous actor when unauthenticated and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating shows and DJs via the backend actor, including getAllShows, getAllDJs, currentShow, createShow, assignDjToShow, and createDJ.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, sets up Tailwind, and defines CSS custom properties for a warm country-themed light and dark color scheme.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/admin/Dashboard.tsx: Admin dashboard displaying stat cards for total shows, DJs, and assigned shows, plus a recent shows list with links to management pages.
frontend/src/pages/admin/ManageDJs.tsx: Admin page for managing DJs, showing a grid of DJ cards with edit buttons and an add button that opens a DJFormModal for creating or editing DJ records.
frontend/src/pages/admin/ManageShows.tsx: Admin page for managing radio shows, displaying a table of shows with edit actions and an add button that opens a ShowFormModal for creating or editing shows.
frontend/src/pages/DJs.tsx: Public DJs listing page that fetches all DJs and shows, then renders them in a responsive grid of DJCard components with loading skeletons and an empty state.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Home page featuring a hero banner with a live listen button, an OnAirNow section, and previews of featured shows and DJs with loading skeletons.
frontend/src/pages/Shows.tsx: Public shows listing page that fetches all shows and DJs and renders them in a responsive grid of ShowCard components with loading and empty states.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom fonts, color tokens (amber, tan, wood-dark, admin palette), border radius, shadows, and animations for the Country Channel theme.
project_state.json: Project state metadata describing The Country Channel radio station app, tracking implemented features such as public pages, admin dashboard, shows/DJs management, and the country music visual theme.
